topics.name: robot learning infrastructure
topics.description: Systems and infrastructure for scalable real-world robot policy learning, including hardware abstraction, robot scheduling, cloud-edge communication, asynchronous data collection/training, and support for imitation or reinforcement learning across heterogeneous embodied platforms.

topics.name: robot state estimation
topics.description: Methods for estimating robot pose, velocity, and odometry from onboard sensors such as IMUs, joint encoders, contact signals, or proprioceptive measurements, especially for legged or mobile robots operating without external perception.

topics.name: robotics benchmark evaluation
topics.description: Benchmarks and evaluation suites for assessing robot learning, planning, manipulation, and embodied physical reasoning capabilities across simulation and real-world settings.

topics.name: robotics simulation
topics.description: Simulation infrastructure and environments for robotics and embodied AI, including physically consistent multi-agent, multimodal, and sensor-rich platforms for training, evaluation, and dataset generation.

topics.name: robust speech recognition
topics.description: Methods for improving automatic speech recognition performance under noisy, reverberant, distorted, or otherwise adverse real-world acoustic conditions, often using acoustic simulation, data augmentation, fine-tuning, or reinforcement learning objectives.

topics.name: scattering amplitudes
topics.description: Research on analytic structures and closed-form expressions for particle scattering amplitudes in quantum field theory, including helicity amplitudes and consistency constraints such as soft theorems.

topics.name: scientific data analysis agents
topics.description: LLM-based or agentic systems that assist scientific data analysis tasks by applying domain knowledge, producing interpretable reasoning, and optionally incorporating human feedback.

topics.name: scientific information extraction
topics.description: Methods and datasets for extracting structured scientific claims, proposals, entities, or evidence from scholarly and research-related text using language models or NLP pipelines.

topics.name: scientific knowledge graphs
topics.description: Construction and use of structured knowledge graphs from scientific literature to represent entities, relations, provenance, and evolution patterns for discovery, retrieval, and research automation.

topics.name: scientific multimodal foundation models
topics.description: Training and alignment of multimodal foundation models for scientific domains, emphasizing scientific visual-language reasoning, domain-aware data curation, supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, and evaluation across scientific and general multimodal tasks.

topics.name: scientific reproducibility evaluation
topics.description: Evaluation and dataset construction for assessing whether scientific claims, methods, or implementation details are faithfully reflected in associated code or reproducibility artifacts, often using LLMs for discrepancy detection.

topics.name: scientific semantic retrieval
topics.description: Semantic retrieval methods for scientific or technical corpora, using language-model representations, embeddings, and query-document matching to find fine-grained scientific facts, claims, theorems, or passages.

topics.name: second-order optimization
topics.description: Research on approximate second-order optimizers, preconditioning methods, and efficient numerical implementations for accelerating neural network training.

topics.name: self-supervised pretraining
topics.description: Methods for improving self-supervised or continued pretraining objectives, data selection, augmentations, or update directions to produce representations or foundation models that transfer better to downstream tasks.

topics.name: self-supervised vision pretraining
topics.description: Pretraining vision foundation models with self-supervised objectives such as masked image modeling, reconstruction, and contrastive learning to produce transferable representations for downstream perception tasks.

topics.name: semantic correspondence
topics.description: Research on learning visual feature matching and dense point-level correspondences across images, emphasizing semantic generalization beyond annotated keypoints or categories.

topics.name: sequence model theory
topics.description: Theoretical analysis of recurrent and sequence-processing architectures, including state-space models and linear attention, focusing on expressivity, stability, error dynamics, and limits of state tracking.

topics.name: sim-to-real robot learning
topics.description: Methods for training robot policies in simulation that transfer robustly to real-world hardware, often using domain randomization, dynamics uncertainty modeling, or zero-shot transfer techniques.

topics.name: sim2real image translation
topics.description: Methods that transform or adapt synthetic visual data to better match real-world image appearance while preserving semantic content, often using image-to-image translation, diffusion editing, or hybrid domain adaptation pipelines.

topics.name: SLAM
topics.description: Methods for simultaneous localization and mapping that estimate camera motion and reconstruct 3D scene structure from sequential visual inputs, often emphasizing geometric consistency, drift correction, and real-time streaming inference.

topics.name: speaker diarization
topics.description: Methods for identifying, segmenting, and attributing speech to speakers or speaker roles, often jointly modeled with automatic speech recognition to produce speaker-attributed transcripts.

topics.name: speaker representation learning
topics.description: Learning speaker embeddings that preserve voice identity across languages, scripts, accents, or domains, often using contrastive, adversarial, or self-supervised speech representations.

topics.name: speculative decoding
topics.description: Methods for accelerating autoregressive LLM inference using draft-and-verify generation, including draft models, draft trees, pruning, retrieval-assisted drafting, and verification-efficient decoding strategies.

topics.name: speech data curation
topics.description: Collection, organization, and release of speech/audio datasets to support speech recognition, analysis, benchmarking, and related audio research.

topics.name: speech language models
topics.description: Research on integrating speech/audio inputs with language models for tasks such as ASR, spoken dialogue understanding, and efficient use of conversational speech context.

topics.name: speech model serving
topics.description: Systems and infrastructure for efficiently serving speech or audio-language models, especially under streaming, low-latency, and high-throughput deployment constraints.

topics.name: speech synthesis evaluation
topics.description: Evaluation methods and benchmarks for text-to-speech and speech synthesis systems, including human preference studies, perceptual quality dimensions, multilingual assessment, and statistical ranking models.

topics.name: speech-to-speech translation
topics.description: Research on translating spoken input directly into spoken output, including methods that preserve linguistic content as well as paralinguistic or expressive cues such as emotion, prosody, and non-verbal vocalizations.

topics.name: statistical genetics
topics.description: Statistical modeling and analysis methods for genetic and genotype-environment interaction data, including mixed-effects models, significance testing, and stability analysis for breeding or genomics applications.

topics.name: statistical lossless compression
topics.description: Methods for lossless data compression based on adaptive statistical probability modeling, calibration, and entropy-coding-oriented distribution estimation rather than neural representation learning.

topics.name: stereo depth estimation
topics.description: Methods for estimating depth from stereo image pairs, including architectures, adaptation techniques, and datasets for robust disparity prediction under challenging visual domains.

topics.name: stochastic physics simulation
topics.description: Computational methods and frameworks for simulating stochastic physical processes and characterizing emergent statistical or structural properties.

topics.name: strategic dialogue agents
topics.description: Methods for dialogue agents that model beliefs, intentions, utilities, or dialogue acts to make strategic decisions in adversarial, cooperative, or negotiation settings.

topics.name: streaming speech recognition
topics.description: Methods and systems for low-latency automatic speech recognition, including transducer-style architectures, streaming inference optimization, text normalization, and dialect or domain adaptation for real-time ASR deployment.

topics.name: streaming video-language models
topics.description: Methods for online video-language models that process incoming video streams causally and generate timely language reasoning or responses during playback, often optimizing latency, temporal coherence, and real-time interaction.

topics.name: structured document QA
topics.description: Methods for answering questions over large document collections by converting unstructured text into structured representations, such as databases or schemas, and performing scalable reasoning over that structured state.

topics.name: symbolic music data curation
topics.description: Curation, cleaning, alignment, and quality control of symbolic music datasets such as MIDI scores and performances for MIR and music generation/modeling tasks.

topics.name: symbolic music representation learning
topics.description: Representation learning methods for symbolic music formats, including curated score datasets, tokenization, masked pretraining, and downstream music understanding tasks such as composer or style classification.

topics.name: synthetic image detection
topics.description: Research on detecting AI-generated or synthetic images, including methods that use discriminative classifiers, generative cues, adversarial signals, or joint generation-detection training to improve authenticity verification and robustness.

topics.name: tabular data cleaning
topics.description: Methods for detecting, repairing, or optimizing preprocessing of noisy tabular datasets, including missing values, outliers, duplicates, and distributional mismatch before applying tabular machine learning or foundation models.

topics.name: tabular LLMs
topics.description: Methods that adapt or apply large language models to structured tabular data for prediction, reasoning, and interpretation, often under few-shot, missing-data, or domain-specific settings.

topics.name: tabular representation learning
topics.description: Learning general-purpose vector representations for tabular data that capture structural, categorical, and numerical semantics for tasks such as classification, retrieval, and semantic matching.

topics.name: tabular retrieval
topics.description: Methods for retrieving structured tables or tabular data using neural or hybrid representations, including robustness to serialization, schema formatting, and table-specific embedding variation.

topics.name: tactile robot manipulation
topics.description: Research on robot manipulation policies that use tactile sensing, contact prediction, and multimodal perception to improve dexterous or contact-rich manipulation in real-world settings.

topics.name: talking face generation
topics.description: Methods for generating or editing videos of speaking faces, often conditioned on audio, text, images, or emotion signals to control lip motion, identity, expression, and realism.

topics.name: temporal graph neural networks
topics.description: Methods that extend graph neural networks with explicit temporal modeling, such as temporal attention or sequence-aware regularization, for learning from dynamic or sequential relational data.

topics.name: test-time adaptation
topics.description: Methods and evaluations for adapting pretrained models to unlabeled target-domain data during inference under distribution shift, without source data access.

topics.name: text-to-3D generation
topics.description: Methods for generating 3D assets or meshes from text prompts, often with controllable geometry, semantics, or structure for downstream applications such as simulation, games, and content creation.

topics.name: text-to-image generation
topics.description: Methods for generating images from textual prompts, including iterative, controllable, or reasoning-guided generation procedures beyond single-step synthesis.

topics.name: text-to-image personalization
topics.description: Methods for customizing or personalizing text-to-image generative models to reproduce user-specified concepts, identities, objects, or styles while preserving the base model's general generation capabilities.

topics.name: text-to-speech synthesis
topics.description: Research on generating natural speech from text, including neural TTS modeling, low-resource adaptation, script or phoneme handling, and acoustic quality improvement.

topics.name: text-to-SQL evaluation
topics.description: Evaluation methods and metrics for natural-language-to-SQL systems, especially those assessing semantic correctness, execution behavior, or alignment with user intent beyond exact reference matching.

topics.name: text-to-SQL generation
topics.description: Methods for generating, ranking, selecting, or refining SQL queries from natural language questions, often using LLM candidate generation, execution feedback, reward scoring, and resampling to improve execution accuracy.

topics.name: textual data integration
topics.description: Methods and systems for combining, reconciling, and providing unified access to heterogeneous textual and structured data sources, including schema alignment, entity matching, semantic extraction, and integration over unstructured text.

topics.name: time series anomaly detection
topics.description: Methods for detecting anomalous patterns in univariate or multivariate time series, often using reconstruction, denoising, forecasting residuals, or representation-based discrepancy scoring.

topics.name: time series benchmark evaluation
topics.description: Benchmarking and evaluation of time series forecasting models across diverse regimes, datasets, metrics, and scaling conditions.

topics.name: time series decomposition
topics.description: Methods for decomposing non-stationary time-series signals into interpretable components or modes for analysis, feature extraction, and downstream machine learning.

topics.name: time series forecasting
topics.description: Methods for predicting future values or event counts from temporal data, including statistical, machine learning, and hybrid approaches for sparse, noisy, or bursty sequences.

topics.name: time series self-supervised learning
topics.description: Self-supervised representation learning methods for time-series data, including masked prediction, latent predictive objectives, and cross-view pretraining to improve transfer and robustness under domain or modality shifts.

topics.name: tokenizer evaluation
topics.description: Evaluation and analysis of subword tokenizers, including vocabulary size trade-offs, morphological coverage, over-segmentation, and suitability for specific languages or modeling settings.

topics.name: tool-augmented agents
topics.description: LLM-based agents that use programmatic tools, terminals, filesystems, APIs, or other external interfaces to autonomously execute real-world digital tasks.

topics.name: Transformer interpretability
topics.description: Research on understanding, diagnosing, and mitigating internal Transformer behaviors such as attention patterns, mechanistic phenomena, and their effects on training, inference, hallucination, and model reliability.

topics.name: UI code generation
topics.description: Methods that translate visual user interface designs or screenshots into executable, editable, or engine-ready UI code/assets, often using vision-language models and structured intermediate representations.

topics.name: uncertainty quantification
topics.description: Methods for estimating, decomposing, calibrating, or acting on predictive uncertainty in machine learning models, including epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty estimation.

topics.name: vector graphics generation
topics.description: Generative methods for producing or optimizing vector-based visual content such as sketches, drawings, or illustrations, often using differentiable rendering and guidance from vision-language or diffusion models.

topics.name: video diffusion
topics.description: Methods for generating or editing video with diffusion-based models, including diffusion transformers and efficiency improvements for text-to-video generation.

topics.name: video editing
topics.description: Methods for editing generated or real videos with text or other controls while preserving structure, temporal coherence, and computational efficiency.

topics.name: video editing benchmark evaluation
topics.description: Benchmarks, datasets, and evaluation models for assessing instruction-guided video editing systems and visual effects quality.

topics.name: video generation control
topics.description: Methods for analyzing, steering, or correcting the temporal and semantic behavior of generated or real video sequences, including pacing control, retiming, and model-agnostic generation guidance.

topics.name: video generation test-time scaling
topics.description: Methods that improve video generation quality at inference time through candidate exploration, reward-guided selection, temporal guidance, memory mechanisms, or other test-time compute scaling strategies without additional model training.

topics.name: video matting
topics.description: Methods for estimating pixel-accurate alpha mattes in videos, often using segmentation cues, temporal consistency, generative priors, or pseudo-labeled data to handle real-world foreground-background separation.

topics.name: video motion prediction
topics.description: Methods for predicting future motion representations such as dense point trajectories or visibility from observed video context, often to support video understanding, generation, or editing.

topics.name: video object segmentation
topics.description: Methods for segmenting and consistently tracking object masks across video frames, especially under motion, occlusion, and viewpoint changes.

topics.name: video representation learning
topics.description: Methods for learning or constructing video embeddings that capture temporal dynamics, motion semantics, and other video-level properties for retrieval, comparison, or downstream understanding tasks.

topics.name: video restoration
topics.description: Methods for restoring degraded videos, including video super-resolution, denoising, deblurring, old-film restoration, and temporally consistent enhancement using motion, reference frames, or learned priors.

topics.name: video retrieval
topics.description: Methods for retrieving or reranking video clips using visual-language representations, temporal context, and consistency-aware matching across video sequences.

topics.name: video saliency prediction
topics.description: Research on predicting human visual attention or saliency maps in video sequences, including datasets, evaluation protocols, and model comparisons for temporal visual attention modeling.

topics.name: video scene graph generation
topics.description: Methods and datasets for extracting structured object, attribute, and relation graphs from videos, often using segmentation, tracking, and vision-language models to represent spatio-temporal scene semantics.

topics.name: video temporal segmentation
topics.description: Methods for partitioning videos into temporally coherent segments or detecting temporal boundaries using video understanding models, often involving transformer-based temporal modeling and synthetic or curated benchmarks.

topics.name: video-guided robot manipulation
topics.description: Methods that use generated or predicted videos as motion or dynamics priors to guide robotic manipulation policies or control without requiring task-specific demonstrations.

topics.name: video-language model robustness
topics.description: Methods and evaluations for improving the robustness of video-language or vision-language reasoning models under realistic visual and temporal perturbations such as occlusion, weather, and camera motion.

topics.name: video-language models
topics.description: Research on multimodal language models that process and reason over video content, including temporal grounding, spatial localization, video question answering, and fine-grained video understanding.

topics.name: virtual try-on
topics.description: Research on synthesizing realistic images of people wearing target garments, including garment-body alignment, appearance transfer, fit modeling, and datasets or models for virtual clothing try-on.

topics.name: vision foundation model distillation
topics.description: Methods for compressing or transferring capabilities from large vision foundation models into smaller task-specific vision models, often using labeled and unlabeled data, pseudo-labeling, self-training, and representation alignment.

topics.name: vision foundation model segmentation
topics.description: Methods that adapt or decode frozen or pretrained vision foundation model features for image, video, or dense prediction segmentation tasks.

topics.name: vision model robustness
topics.description: Methods for improving robustness of vision models under distribution shifts by reducing reliance on spurious correlations and encouraging semantically meaningful visual reasoning.

topics.name: vision representation probing
topics.description: Studies that evaluate and analyze internal visual model representations using probing methods such as linear classifiers across layers, modules, or distribution shifts.

topics.name: vision simulation
topics.description: Simulation frameworks and procedural environments for computer vision research, including synthetic data generation, controllable scene variation, ground-truth annotation, and closed-loop evaluation.

topics.name: vision-language model architecture optimization
topics.description: Research on improving VLM design choices such as vision encoders, multimodal interfaces, and lightweight architectures to increase efficiency and visual-language reasoning performance without simply scaling model size.

topics.name: vision-language model debiasing
topics.description: Methods for reducing social or spurious biases in vision-language models, including post-hoc embedding-space interventions, fairness-aware representation editing, and debiasing for retrieval or zero-shot classification.

topics.name: vision-language model decoding
topics.description: Test-time decoding methods for vision-language models that modify output distributions or generation behavior to improve grounding, factuality, or reduce hallucinations without additional training.

topics.name: vision-language model distillation
topics.description: Methods for transferring knowledge from larger vision-language or multimodal teacher models to smaller student models, focusing on cross-modal alignment, probability/logit supervision, and efficient deployment.

topics.name: vision-language model fine-tuning
topics.description: Methods for adapting pretrained vision-language models such as CLIP to downstream tasks while preserving robustness, generalization, or interpretability.

topics.name: vision-language model personalization
topics.description: Methods that adapt or augment vision-language models to produce user-specific outputs by leveraging personalized multimodal history, preferences, or contextual visual-textual experiences.

topics.name: vision-language navigation
topics.description: Methods for embodied agents that navigate environments by grounding visual observations and language goals or instructions, including long-horizon planning toward unseen targets.

topics.name: vision-language-action models
topics.description: Research on adapting vision-language representations into action-conditioned robotic policy models, including embodied supervision, robot trajectory pretraining, and parameter-efficient adaptation strategies for VLA initialization and control.

topics.name: visual affordance prediction
topics.description: Methods and benchmarks for predicting action-relevant affordances from visual observations, often connecting scene perception, object grounding, and embodied AI decision making.

topics.name: visual anomaly detection
topics.description: Methods and datasets for detecting anomalous patterns or rule violations in images, especially in industrial inspection or visual quality-control settings.

topics.name: visual feature upsampling
topics.description: Methods that transform low-resolution visual backbone features into denser high-resolution feature maps efficiently for downstream dense prediction or generative vision tasks.

topics.name: visual generation reinforcement learning
topics.description: Reinforcement learning methods for optimizing and aligning visual generative models, including reward-guided training, credit assignment, and stability mechanisms for image or visual token generation.

topics.name: visual grounding
topics.description: Methods for grounding language expressions or prompts in images by localizing objects or regions, often using vision-language models for bounding box or point prediction and detection.

topics.name: visual object tracking
topics.description: Methods for tracking a specified object across video frames, often using motion modeling, appearance consistency, segmentation priors, or foundation-model adaptation to maintain target identity under occlusion, distractors, and complex motion.

topics.name: visual token pruning
topics.description: Methods that reduce redundant visual tokens in vision-language or multimodal models to improve inference efficiency while preserving task-relevant visual and spatial information.

topics.name: visual tokenization
topics.description: Methods for learning image tokenizers or latent autoencoders that convert pixels into compact visual tokens or latents for downstream generative modeling and reconstruction.

topics.name: voice agent benchmark evaluation
topics.description: Evaluation methods and benchmarks for spoken conversational agents, focusing on multi-turn audio interaction, task completion, speech fidelity, turn-taking, user simulation, and robustness to voice-specific perturbations such as accents and noise.

topics.name: weakly supervised anomaly detection
topics.description: Methods for detecting and localizing anomalies when only coarse-grained or incomplete supervision is available, often using approaches such as multi-instance learning, prototype modeling, or consistency regularization.

topics.name: wearable motion understanding
topics.description: Methods for learning transferable representations from wearable sensor signals such as IMUs to understand human motion, activities, and motion-language semantics across devices and sensing setups.

topics.name: world model benchmark evaluation
topics.description: Benchmarks and evaluation toolkits for assessing interactive or generative world models under standardized scenes, actions, trajectories, and consistency metrics.

topics.name: world models
topics.description: Models that learn to generate or predict interactive environment dynamics from observations and actions, often for simulation, planning, or embodied agent control.

topics.name: zero-shot anomaly detection
topics.description: Methods for detecting and localizing anomalous visual patterns without in-domain training images, often by adapting pretrained vision or vision-language foundation models using synthetic data or lightweight adaptation.
